title: Subscription

hero.title: Unlock the Full Version
hero.subtitle: 7-day free trial. Subscribe after to keep using all features.

features.autoUpload: Auto-upload new photos and videos from your library
features.customTime: Custom start time for auto upload, down to seconds
features.sharedDir: Browse and download the shared directory on your connected computer
features.preview: Preview images and videos in the shared directory
features.multiDevice: Connect and switch between multiple devices

errors.productUnavailable: This product is unavailable. Please contact support.
errors.productMismatch: Product configuration error. Please contact support.
errors.alreadyOwned: You already have an active subscription. If you want to switch plans, please retry or manage it in App Store settings.
errors.receiptBoundToOther: This Apple subscription is linked to another account. Please sign in with the original account, or switch to a different Apple Sandbox Tester to test a new purchase.

footer: Subscribing means you agree to auto-renewal. Cancel any time.

alert.devBody: Payment is under development. Stay tuned!

gate.downloadBody: Downloads from the shared folder need an active subscription.

reminder.warn7Body: Your subscription ends in {{days}} days. Renew to keep all features.
reminder.warnTodayBody: Renew today to avoid losing access.
reminder.expiredBody: Renew to keep using Vivi Drop.
